name: Zeus Rush
description: Leverage Zeus' passive favor generation and Bolt divine power for an early attack.

steps.label: 3 Villagers on Food
steps.description: Send your 3 starting villagers onto the nearest herd of animals or berry bushes.
steps.notes: Zeus worshippers generate favor passively — no Temple needed in the early game.

steps.label: 2 Villagers on Wood
steps.description: Queue 2 more villagers. Task both on the nearest trees when they pop.
steps.notes: Wood is critical for houses and a future Temple of Zeus.

steps.label: Build House & 2 more Food Villagers
steps.description: Build 1 House to raise your population cap, then queue 2 food villagers.
steps.notes: Each house gives +10 pop. Keep building houses proactively.

steps.label: Research Hunting Dogs
steps.description: Research Hunting Dogs at your Town Center to speed up food gathering.
steps.notes: Hunting Dogs costs 100 food and dramatically increases hunt gather rate.

steps.label: Advance to Heroic Age – Ares
steps.description: With 9–10 villagers and enough resources, click Classical Age, choosing Ares as your minor god.
steps.notes: Ares provides Pestilence to weaken enemy eco and the powerful Cyclops myth unit.

steps.label: Produce Hoplites & Use Bolt
steps.description: Build a Military Academy and train Hoplites. Fire Zeus' Bolt divine power at an enemy building.
steps.notes: Bolt deals 600 damage to any unit or building — use it on the Town Center for maximum disruption.

steps.label: Push with Hoplites + Myth Unit
steps.description: Combine Hoplites with a Cyclops myth unit and push the enemy base. Use Pestilence on key resource gatherers.
steps.notes: Hoplites deal bonus damage to myth units — mix with Cyclops to counter enemy armies.
